requirement_topic.en: ARSE / CEET / CEB Grid-Connection Standards — Anti-Islanding (IEC 62116), IEC 61727 Utility Interface, and 50 Hz / 220/380 V Settings
requirement_topic.zh: ARSE / CEET / CEB并网标准——防孤岛（IEC 62116）、IEC 61727公用事业接口及50 Hz / 220/380 V参数
requirement_topic.zht: ARSE / CEET / CEB併網標準——防孤島（IEC 62116）、IEC 61727公用事業接口及50 Hz / 220/380 V參數

summary.en: Togo's electricity sector is regulated by ARSE (Autorité de Réglementation du Secteur de l'Electricité). CEET distributes electricity on the Togolese territory, while CEB (Communauté Électrique du Bénin, shared by Togo and Benin) has a transmission, import, and regional interconnection role. For grid-connected solar PV inverters, Togo does not publish a Qatar-style inverter model list in the source set reviewed; the practical compliance package is therefore built around ARSE authorization, CEET/CEB connection approval, national conformity review, and IEC evidence commonly required by utilities, project owners, and donor/lender specifications. Key technical evidence includes IEC 62116 anti-islanding, IEC 61727 utility-interface characteristics, 50 Hz / 220 V single-phase / 380 V three-phase grid settings, and documented protection relay and reconnection parameters for the Togo connection point.
summary.zh: 多哥电力行业由ARSE（电力行业监管机构）监管。CEET负责多哥境内配电，CEB（贝宁-多哥电力共同体）承担输电、进口和区域互联职能。对于并网太阳能光伏逆变器，在已审阅来源中未发现多哥发布类似卡塔尔的逆变器型号清单；因此实际合规包应围绕ARSE授权、CEET/CEB并网审批、国家合格评定审查，以及公用事业、项目业主和捐助方/贷款方规格通常要求的IEC证据建立。关键技术证据包括IEC 62116防孤岛、IEC 61727公用事业接口特性、50 Hz / 220 V单相 / 380 V三相电网参数，以及针对多哥接入点记录的保护继电器和重连参数。
summary.zht: 多哥電力行業由ARSE（電力行業監管機構）監管。CEET負責多哥境內配電，CEB（貝寧-多哥電力共同體）承擔輸電、進口和區域互聯職能。對於併網太陽能光伏逆變器，在已審閱來源中未發現多哥發布類似卡達的逆變器型號清單；因此實際合規包應圍繞ARSE授權、CEET/CEB併網審批、國家合格評定審查，以及公用事業、項目業主和捐助方/貸款方規格通常要求的IEC證據建立。關鍵技術證據包括IEC 62116防孤島、IEC 61727公用事業接口特性、50 Hz / 220 V單相 / 380 V三相電網參數，以及針對多哥接入點記錄的保護繼電器和重連參數。

standards_or_laws: IEC 62116 — Utility-interconnected photovoltaic inverters — Test procedure of islanding prevention measures
IEC 61727 — Photovoltaic (PV) systems — Characteristics of the utility interface
IEC 62109-1/-2 — Safety of power converters for use in photovoltaic power systems
Togo Law No. 2018-010 of 8 August 2018 — promotion of electricity production from renewable energy sources
ARSE renewable-energy authorization and operation requirements for electricity production units
CEET / CEB grid-connection and power-purchase or connection arrangements

summary.en: Chinese grid-connection evidence commonly includes GB/T 19964-2024 (Technical Requirements for Connecting Photovoltaic Power Station to Power System), NB/T 32004 (Technical Specification for Photovoltaic Grid-Connected Inverters), GB/T 37408-2021 / GB/T 37408-series inverter technical requirements, and domestic anti-islanding test results. China's nominal grid voltage is 220/380 V at 50 Hz, so the basic voltage and frequency are aligned with Togo's commonly referenced grid supply. However, Chinese GB/T and NB/T documents are based on Chinese grid codes and grid-operator requirements; they do not constitute ARSE authorization, CEET/CEB connection approval, or IEC type-test evidence for a Togo project.
summary.zh: 中国并网证据通常包括GB/T 19964-2024（光伏发电站接入电力系统技术规定）、NB/T 32004（光伏并网逆变器技术规范）、GB/T 37408-2021 / GB/T 37408系列逆变器技术要求，以及国内防孤岛测试结果。中国标称电网电压为50 Hz、220/380 V，与多哥常用供电参数在基本电压和频率上相同。然而，中国GB/T和NB/T文件基于中国电网规程和电网运营商要求；它们不构成多哥项目的ARSE授权、CEET/CEB并网审批或IEC型式试验证据。
summary.zht: 中國併網證據通常包括GB/T 19964-2024（光伏發電站接入電力系統技術規定）、NB/T 32004（光伏併網逆變器技術規範）、GB/T 37408-2021 / GB/T 37408系列逆變器技術要求，以及國內防孤島測試結果。中國標稱電網電壓為50 Hz、220/380 V，與多哥常用供電參數在基本電壓和頻率上相同。然而，中國GB/T和NB/T文件基於中國電網規程和電網運營商要求；它們不構成多哥項目的ARSE授權、CEET/CEB併網審批或IEC型式試驗證據。

standards_or_laws: GB/T 19964-2024 — 光伏发电站接入电力系统技术规定 (Technical Requirements for Connecting Photovoltaic Power Station to Power System)
GB/T 156 — 标准电压 (Standard voltages) — 220/380 V, 50 Hz
NB/T 32004-2018 — 光伏并网逆变器技术规范 (Technical Specification for Photovoltaic Grid-Connected Inverters)
GB/T 37408-2021 — 光伏并网逆变器技术要求 (Technical Requirements for Photovoltaic Grid-Connected Inverters)

gap.en: Gap: Togo and China share the same 50 Hz / 220/380 V nominal grid basis, so voltage re-parameterisation is usually less significant than for 240/415 V markets. The remaining gap is documentary and project-governance driven: Chinese GB/T grid documents do not replace IEC 62116 anti-islanding reports, IEC 61727 utility-interface evidence, ARSE authorization, CEET/CEB connection approval, or donor/lender technical specifications. Exporters should prepare model-specific IEC reports, a settings sheet for the Togo connection point, and evidence that high-temperature, dust, and humidity derating have been assessed for the project site.
gap.zh: 差距：多哥与中国共用50 Hz / 220/380 V标称电网基础，因此电压重新参数化通常不如240/415 V市场显著。剩余差距主要来自文件和项目治理：中国GB/T并网文件不能替代IEC 62116防孤岛报告、IEC 61727公用事业接口证据、ARSE授权、CEET/CEB并网审批或捐助方/贷款方技术规格。出口商应准备特定型号的IEC报告、多哥接入点参数整定表，以及已针对项目场址评估高温、粉尘和湿度降额的证据。
gap.zht: 差距：多哥與中國共用50 Hz / 220/380 V標稱電網基礎，因此電壓重新參數化通常不如240/415 V市場顯著。剩餘差距主要來自文件和項目治理：中國GB/T併網文件不能替代IEC 62116防孤島報告、IEC 61727公用事業接口證據、ARSE授權、CEET/CEB併網審批或捐助方/貸款方技術規格。出口商應準備特定型號的IEC報告、多哥接入點參數整定表，以及已針對項目場址評估高溫、粉塵和濕度降額的證據。

mandatory_status.target: Mandatory as a project gate where a PV installation connects to the public grid: ARSE authorization and CEET/CEB connection approval must be obtained; IEC evidence is mandatory where required by the utility, conformity reviewer, project owner, or donor/lender specification
mandatory_status.cn: Chinese grid-connection evidence satisfies China's domestic grid-operator framework but does not transfer to ARSE authorization or CEET/CEB acceptance in Togo

source.publisher: ARSE — Autorité de Réglementation du Secteur de l'Electricité

compliance_verdict.en: [INFORMATIONAL] Treat Chinese GB/T grid evidence as useful background only. For Togo, build the project package around ARSE authorization, CEET/CEB connection approval, IEC 62116 anti-islanding evidence, IEC 61727 utility-interface evidence, and site-specific protection settings for 50 Hz / 220/380 V. Confirm the current ARSE authorization category and CEET/CEB connection procedure before shipment or commissioning.
compliance_verdict.zh: [仅供参考] 应将中国GB/T并网证据仅视为背景资料。多哥项目合规包应围绕ARSE授权、CEET/CEB并网审批、IEC 62116防孤岛证据、IEC 61727公用事业接口证据，以及50 Hz / 220/380 V场址特定保护设置建立。出货或调试前，请确认现行ARSE授权类别和CEET/CEB并网程序。
compliance_verdict.zht: [僅供參考] 應將中國GB/T併網證據僅視為背景資料。多哥項目合規包應圍繞ARSE授權、CEET/CEB併網審批、IEC 62116防孤島證據、IEC 61727公用事業接口證據，以及50 Hz / 220/380 V場址特定保護設置建立。出貨或調試前，請確認現行ARSE授權類別和CEET/CEB併網程序。

requirement_topic.en: ARSE Renewable-Energy Authorization, CEET Distribution Connection, and Donor/Lender Solar Project Gates
requirement_topic.zh: ARSE可再生能源授权、CEET配电接入及捐助方/贷款方太阳能项目门槛
requirement_topic.zht: ARSE可再生能源授權、CEET配電接入及捐助方/貸款方太陽能項目門檻

summary.en: ARSE states that renewable-energy production projects may require declarations, installation authorizations, operating authorizations, licences, or concessions depending on purpose, power, and whether the installation supplies the public network. ARSE's operator guidance identifies thresholds for renewable self-consumption installations and requires authorization before installation and operation for larger renewable units; public-supply renewable projects also require the relevant concession, licence, or sale arrangement. CEET is the national distributor, while CEB is relevant for transmission, imports, and regional interconnection. Togo's solar growth context includes utility-scale projects such as Blitta and rural electrification programmes such as CIZO; these projects often add donor/lender or owner equipment specifications on top of ARSE and CEET/CEB approvals.
summary.zh: ARSE说明，可再生能源发电项目根据用途、功率以及是否向公共电网供电，可能需要申报、安装授权、运营授权、许可证或特许经营。ARSE运营商指南列明了可再生能源自发自用装置的门槛，并要求较大规模可再生能源机组在安装和运营前取得授权；公共供电类可再生能源项目还需取得相应特许经营、许可证或售电安排。CEET是国家配电企业，CEB则与输电、进口和区域互联相关。多哥太阳能发展背景包括Blitta等公用事业规模项目和CIZO等农村电气化计划；这些项目通常在ARSE和CEET/CEB审批之外叠加捐助方/贷款方或业主设备规格。
summary.zht: ARSE說明，可再生能源發電項目根據用途、功率以及是否向公共電網供電，可能需要申報、安裝授權、運營授權、許可證或特許經營。ARSE運營商指南列明了可再生能源自發自用裝置的門檻，並要求較大規模可再生能源機組在安裝和運營前取得授權；公共供電類可再生能源項目還需取得相應特許經營、許可證或售電安排。CEET是國家配電企業，CEB則與輸電、進口和區域互聯相關。多哥太陽能發展背景包括Blitta等公用事業規模項目和CIZO等農村電氣化計畫；這些項目通常在ARSE和CEET/CEB審批之外疊加捐助方/貸款方或業主設備規格。

standards_or_laws: Togo Law No. 2000-012 of 18 July 2000 — electricity sector framework
Togo Law No. 2018-010 of 8 August 2018 — promotion of electricity production from renewable energy sources
Arrêté No. 2019/034/MME/CAB/ARSE — declaration, installation authorization, and operating authorization conditions for electricity production units
Arrêté No. 2019/035/MME/CAB/ARSE — fee schedule for renewable-energy authorization procedures
CEET distribution connection requirements and CEB transmission/interconnection arrangements
IEC 62109-1/-2, IEC 62116, IEC 61727, IEC 62920 — common inverter evidence set in donor/lender specifications

summary.en: China does not have a direct equivalent to Togo's ARSE authorization and CEET/CEB connection framework. Distributed and utility-scale solar connection in China is governed by National Energy Administration policies and grid operator rules from State Grid or China Southern Power Grid, with domestic technical standards such as NB/T 32004, GB/T 37408, and GB/T 19964-2024. Chinese approvals or CQC/CGC voluntary certificates do not create legal authorization to install or operate a renewable-energy generation unit in Togo and do not satisfy donor/lender equipment specifications unless the project documents expressly accept them.
summary.zh: 中国没有与多哥ARSE授权及CEET/CEB接入框架直接对应的机制。中国分布式和公用事业规模太阳能并网受国家能源局政策以及国家电网或南方电网运营商规则管理，并使用NB/T 32004、GB/T 37408、GB/T 19964-2024等国内技术标准。中国审批或CQC/CGC自愿证书并不构成在多哥安装或运营可再生能源发电机组的法律授权，也不能满足捐助方/贷款方设备规格，除非项目文件明确接受。
summary.zht: 中國沒有與多哥ARSE授權及CEET/CEB接入框架直接對應的機制。中國分散式和公用事業規模太陽能併網受國家能源局政策以及國家電網或南方電網運營商規則管理，並使用NB/T 32004、GB/T 37408、GB/T 19964-2024等國內技術標準。中國審批或CQC/CGC自願證書並不構成在多哥安裝或運營可再生能源發電機組的法律授權，也不能滿足捐助方/貸款方設備規格，除非項目文件明確接受。

standards_or_laws: NB/T 32004-2018 — 光伏并网逆变器技术规范 (Technical Specification for Photovoltaic Grid-Connected Inverters)
GB/T 37408-2021 — 光伏并网逆变器技术要求 (Technical Requirements for Photovoltaic Grid-Connected Inverters)
GB/T 19964-2024 — 光伏发电站接入电力系统技术规定 (Technical Requirements for Connecting Photovoltaic Power Station to Power System)

gap.en: Gap: Chinese domestic solar approvals do not transfer to Togo. The exporter or project developer must identify the ARSE regime that applies to the installation, obtain required installation and operating authorization before work and operation, secure CEET/CEB connection or sale arrangements where the inverter is grid-tied, and satisfy the project owner's donor/lender technical specifications. For CIZO-style rural electrification, utility-scale IPP projects, or lender-financed PV, IEC test reports and environmental suitability evidence may be decisive even where the national rule does not list a specific inverter model certificate.
gap.zh: 差距：中国国内太阳能审批不能转移至多哥。出口商或项目开发商须识别适用于装置的ARSE制度，在施工和运营前取得所需安装和运营授权，在逆变器并网时取得CEET/CEB接入或售电安排，并满足项目业主的捐助方/贷款方技术规格。对于CIZO类农村电气化、公用事业规模IPP项目或贷款方融资光伏项目，即使国家规则未列明特定逆变器型号证书，IEC测试报告和环境适应性证据也可能成为关键。
gap.zht: 差距：中國國內太陽能審批不能轉移至多哥。出口商或項目開發商須識別適用於裝置的ARSE制度，在施工和運營前取得所需安裝和運營授權，在逆變器併網時取得CEET/CEB接入或售電安排，並滿足項目業主的捐助方/貸款方技術規格。對於CIZO類農村電氣化、公用事業規模IPP項目或貸款方融資光伏項目，即使國家規則未列明特定逆變器型號證書，IEC測試報告和環境適應性證據也可能成為關鍵。

mandatory_status.target: Mandatory — ARSE declaration, authorization, licence, or concession status must be resolved before installation and operation where the Togo regime applies; CEET/CEB connection approval is mandatory for grid-tied operation; donor/lender gates are contractually mandatory where included in project documents
mandatory_status.cn: Chinese distributed or utility-scale solar approvals are granted under China domestic policy and grid operator rules — not transferable to Togo

source.publisher: ARSE / Ministère des Mines et des Energies (Togo)

compliance_verdict.en: [INFORMATIONAL] ARSE authorization and CEET/CEB connection approval are separate gates from Chinese solar approvals. Before committing a Chinese inverter to a Togo project, confirm the applicable ARSE declaration, authorization, licence, or concession route, then verify the project owner's IEC and environmental qualification requirements. For donor/lender-backed solar, assume IEC reports will be requested unless the procurement documents say otherwise.
compliance_verdict.zh: [仅供参考] ARSE授权和CEET/CEB并网审批是独立于中国太阳能审批的门槛。在将中国逆变器投入多哥项目前，请确认适用的ARSE申报、授权、许可证或特许经营路径，并核实项目业主的IEC和环境适应性要求。对于捐助方/贷款方支持的太阳能项目，除非采购文件另有说明，应假定需要IEC报告。
compliance_verdict.zht: [僅供參考] ARSE授權和CEET/CEB併網審批是獨立於中國太陽能審批的門檻。在將中國逆變器投入多哥項目前，請確認適用的ARSE申報、授權、許可證或特許經營路徑，並核實項目業主的IEC和環境適應性要求。對於捐助方/貸款方支持的太陽能項目，除非採購文件另有說明，應假定需要IEC報告。
